name: Daily news digest from web sources via email
description: Searches the web for news on specified topics using Exa, uses Claude AI to summarize articles into a concise daily digest, and delivers it via Gmail.

source.originalName: Daily news digest: summarize RSS feeds with OpenAI and deliver to WhatsApp

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for searching news articles

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for sending the digest email

recipientEmail.description: Email address to send the daily digest to

topics.description: Comma-separated news topics (e.g. 'AI, startups, climate tech')

maxArticles.description: Maximum number of articles to include (default 10)

steps.name: Build Exa search queries from topics
Search for recent news articles with Exa
Extract article data from search results
Build AI prompt for news digest generation
Run Claude AI to generate news digest
Build email body from AI digest
